texto: But there was a monster lurking in the deepest, blackest corners of his soul. An angry, slathering, vengeful beast, who had a mouth full of butcher knives and a tongue that dripped acid. A monster who ached for freedom. A monster that longed to flay the very soul from his victims, that monster was called the Darkrider.
explicacao: Citação de Michael B. Patterson sobre temas ligados a amor. “But there was a monster lurking in the deepest, blackest corners of his soul. An angry, slatherin…” articula amor, romance, supernatural em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e supernatural.
